title: callaeum macropterum
intro: Callaeum macropterum, also known as the "sensitive plant," is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. Native to tropical regions, Callaeum macropterum has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and easing congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Callaeum macropterum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
